title: season — HTTP routes
description: Tenant-facing season CRUD + lifecycle actions (set-current, open/close-registration, start, begin-playoffs, complete, archive, restore) + the heavy-traffic current-season lookup. Platform-admin cross-tenant read. Every tenant route carries `entitlement.enforce:sports_seasons` at minimum; Small tier is blocked at that middleware.

groups.name: tenant-seasons
groups.description: Admin-facing Season CRUD scoped to the active tenant. Every tenant member can READ; WRITE gated by seasons.create / update / delete + specific lifecycle permissions.

routes.description: filter[status], filter[is_current], filter[organization_id], filter[branch_id], filter[sport_key], filter[season_type], filter[start_date.gte], filter[end_date.lte], filter[has_playoffs], sort[]=start_date,end_date,sort_order,name,created_at, include=organization,branch,active_enrollment_count. Default sort: start_date desc, sort_order asc, name asc. include_archived=true opts into archived rows.

Admin-triggered creation. Body: SeasonCreateData — name (required), start_date (required), end_date (required), season_type (required), organization_id (nullable), branch_id (nullable), sport_key (nullable, entitlement-gated), registration_opens_at, registration_closes_at, late_registration_ends_at, competition_starts_at, has_playoffs, playoff_starts_at, playoff_ends_at, is_current, sort_order, primary_color, capacity_target, max_enrollments_per_athlete, allows_late_registration, late_registration_fee_cents, description. Consumes 1 `season_slot` per overlapping calendar year.

The high-traffic endpoint every frontend page + every enrollment surface calls. Query params (all optional): organization_id, branch_id, sport_key. Returns the most-specific `is_current=true` Season matching the scope tuple per the fallback chain in readme.md §6. Cached per (tenant, organization, branch, sport_key) with 5-minute TTL. 404 when NO Season is current in any resolved tuple (matches the 'always-on scheduling' case for tenants with no active season).

Update mutable fields. Body: SeasonUpdateData — name, slug, description, season_type, registration_opens_at, registration_closes_at, late_registration_ends_at, competition_starts_at, has_playoffs, playoff_starts_at, playoff_ends_at, sort_order, primary_color, capacity_target, max_enrollments_per_athlete, allows_late_registration, late_registration_fee_cents. Immutable-post-create: tenant_id, organization_id, branch_id. sport_key mutable only pre-in_progress. start_date / end_date mutable in-progress only with `seasons.dates.shift` permission (audit-warn).

Soft-delete (archive path). Requires Season.status='completed' first. Refused when is_current=true OR when active downstream enrollments reference. Hard-delete via PurgeArchivedSeasonsJob after retention window.
Flip is_current=true (auto-demotes the previous current in same scope tuple in the same transaction). Fires SeasonCurrentChanged (audit-critical). Refused when Season.status='archived'.
Manual transition planned -> registration_open. Refused when now() < registration_opens_at UNLESS caller has `seasons.registration.open-early`. Body: { reason? }. Fires SeasonRegistrationOpened.
Manual transition registration_open -> registration_closed. Body: { reason? }. Fires SeasonRegistrationClosed. Does NOT block the late-registration window — that's independent.
Manual transition (registration_open OR registration_closed) -> in_progress. Body: { reason? }. Fires SeasonStarted. Refused when now() < start_date UNLESS caller has `seasons.start.early`.

Manual transition in_progress -> playoffs. Refused when has_playoffs=false OR when now() < playoff_starts_at UNLESS caller has `seasons.playoffs.begin-early`. Body: { reason? }. Fires SeasonPlayoffsBegun.
Manual transition (in_progress OR playoffs) -> completed. Body: { reason? }. Fires SeasonCompleted.
Manual transition completed -> archived. Body: { reason }. Refused when is_current=true OR when active downstream enrollments reference. Fires SeasonArchived.
Archived -> completed. Only within the retention window (default 2555 days = 7 years). Fires SeasonRestored.

groups.name: platform-seasons
groups.description: Cross-tenant read for support tooling. Writes stay on the tenant surface — platform ops must impersonate an admin (via `access::delegation`) to write.

routes.description: Cross-tenant filterable list. filter[tenant_id], filter[status], filter[is_current], filter[sport_key], filter[season_type], filter[start_date.gte], filter[end_date.lte].
Single-season cross-tenant read with full metadata + phase history.
